objective: Architectural sign-off on the mkdirSync static import fix — verify implementation aligns with project architecture, no cross-cutting concerns, deployment posture understood.
key_changes: mkdirSync is a top-level static import from 'fs' — correct ESM pattern
save() is synchronous with no await — matches persistence model
mkdirSync called before writeFileSync — correct ordering, prevents ENOENT
No cross-cutting impact — change localized to save() in graph.ts
All gates pass: build 0 errors, 31 tests, lint clean
Regression guard uses invocationCallOrder — strong regression assertion
No version bump or migration required — verification only
Fully backwards compatible — no API surface changes
Unused deps (lowdb, enquirer) flagged as tech debt
No concurrency safety on read-modify-write — acceptable for single-user CLI
